word: G1685 - ἐμβάλλω - embállō - em-bal'-lo - Cast into

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐμβάλλω

- Transliteration: Emballo

- Phonetic: em-bal'-lo

- Definition:

1. to throw in, cast into

- Origin: from G1722 and G906

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1722 and G906; to throw on that is (figuratively) subject to (eternal punishment): - cast into.
